name: Strawberry-Pineapple Parfait
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the gelatin over the cold water and place the mixture over low heat, stirring constantly until the gelatin dissolves.
2. Drain the pineapple and thaw the strawberries.
3. Add the ice milk and fruits to a bowl, then stir gently until everything is well mixed.
4. Portion the mixture into 4 individual dishes.
5. Refrigerate until serving time. Do not freeze.
